2365820.name: Neural Synapse
2365820.description:
A distinctive journey awaits you, where you'll delve into the narrative of our protagonist navigating the shadowy alleys of a futuristic metropolis.
Immerse yourself in a realm of technological advancements and criminal mysteries, where the repercussions of your every choice unfold.
Employ your logical reasoning and analytical skills to endure in this tumultuous world.

Key Features:
• Third Person 3D Adventure
• Non-linear Storytelling
• Exciting missions
• Mini Games
• Clean tone story
• Multiple endings
2365820.supported_languages: 英语, 德语, 乌克兰语
